category_sources: Official id3v2 homepage describes it as a command-line editor for id3v2 tags.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the primary documentation surface and describes purpose, usage context, downloads, and relationship to id3lib.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page has Git and CVS source-code tabs for id3v2.
source_facts.homepage points to the official id3v2 SourceForge-hosted project site.
tags_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge summary describe editing, adding, modifying, deleting, and converting ID3 tags.
